title: Five tech specs that have us excited for the Redmi Note 13 Series
description: BUSINESS NEWS - As tech enthusiasts, we...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - As tech enthusiasts, we often come across new phone launches, but the Redmi Note 13 Series stands out from the crowd.


> These devices bring a host of unique features that are sure to captivate even the most seasoned geeks.


Let's discuss some of the features available on the Redmi Note 13, Redmi Note 13 Pro, and Redmi Note 13 Pro+ 5G.

1. Smart home integrationThanks to the seamless integration into Xiaomi smart wearables and home appliances, your new Redmi Note 13 Series phone is the keystone in a smart home environment.

To make this even more seamless, you can pick up Xiaomi smart devices like the Redmi Smart Watch, Xiaomi Smart Robot Vacuum, Xiaomi Smart Air Fryer, Xiaomi Smart Speaker, and Xiaomi Smart Fan in an add-on bundle from Vodacom starting at just R9 extra on a contract for a new Redmi Note 13 Series phone.

Pay just R329 for the Redmi Note 13, only R429 for the Redmi Note 13 Pro, and R699 for the Redmi Note 13 Pro+ 5G. All these deals are available until 6th May or until stock runs out. Speak to your Vodacom agent today to see the Xiaomi smart devices you can get starting from R9 per month, or visit a local Vodacom branch today for the whole story.

2. Massive wattage chargingUnlike other companies that don't even give you the charger in the box anymore, Redmi Note 13 Series packs high-wattage chargers for all members of the Note 13 Series.

The Redmi Note 13 has a 33W fast charger, the Redmi Note 13 Pro has a 67W turbo charger, and the Redmi Note 13 Pro+ 5G kicks things into the ludicrous with a 120W HyperCharger. With so much wattage on hand, you will be taking pit stops at the wall to charge up instead of leaving your phone idle like we used to in the past.

That 120W HyperCharger can get you to 100 percent charge in just 19 minutes - unthinkable numbers a few years ago.

Both the Redmi Note 13 Pro and Redmi Note 13 Pro+ 5G come with a camera trio of a 200MP main shooter complemented by an 8MP ultra-wide lens and a 2MP macro camera.

Combine this glass with Optical image stabilisation (OIS), 2X/4X zoom, professional lens calibration and a slew of built-in editing options, and you don't just have a new camera in your pocket; you have a content creation suite that is ready to go at all times.

Our pick is the 2X and 4X lossless, optical-grade zoom. In our professional work covering events, we don't always get to be at the front of the pack to take pictures of the latest launch, speak with executives, or conduct celebrity interviews. The ability to zoom in from the back of the room gives our readers the quality images they deserve without us needing to elbow into the front of the pack.

4. All that storageWhile we're supposed to love cloud storage and its flexibility and space, we really love instant access and ownership of our data, which still makes local storage king in our books.

That's why we must mention the massive 512GB of storage on the Redmi Note 13 Pro and Redmi Note 13 Pro+ 5G. Even when capturing super-high-resolution pictures and videos with those impressive cameras, it will take a while to fill half a terabyte of storage.

Aside from pictures and video, that also means ample space for apps and all their data, so if you love having everything installed all at once, you're catered for here.

5. The best picture in townThe Redmi Note 13 Series ships with 6.67-inch screens sporting AMOLED panels. If you have yet to use an AMOLED screen, you owe it to yourself to visit the nearest brick-and-mortar phone or electronics store to see it in person.

AMOLED doesn’t just give you the deepest blacks and the most accurate colour reproduction, but also the super high brightness to properly appreciate the picture, even in direct sunlight. You can look forward to between 1 300 and 1 800 nits of brightness in the Redmi Note 13 Series and peace of mind that these beautiful screens will be protected thanks to Gorilla Glass 5 and IP68-rated dust and water resistance.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
